entry.title: [US][Network Services] - OVHcloud Load Balancer Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 11, 09:00 - 13:00 UTC

Jul 3, 14:42 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our Load Balancing offering in the US region.

Start time : 11/08/2026 09:00 UTC
End time : 11/08/2026 13:00 UTC
Service impact : Customers may experience brief periods of degraded performance during the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Load Balancing infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [WAW1][Cooling System] - Rack WAW0106B04C maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 6, 06:00 - 14:00 UTC

Jul 7, 03:39 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 06/08/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 06/08/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the cooling system's efficiency may be temporarily reduced for some servers, potentially lowering performance. Despite ongoing mitigation efforts, customers could still experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [YNM1][Infrastructure] - Rack YNM0102H02A maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 6, 04:30 - 12:30 UTC

Jul 7, 03:42 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Start time : 06/08/2026 04:30 UTC
End time : 06/08/2026 12:30 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the servers in the affected rack will be gracefully shut down beforehand. Customers hosted on these servers should expect a planned service interruption for the duration of the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [SYD2][Infrastructure ] - Room S2-5X-02 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 29, 21:00 UTC  -  Jul 30, 07:00 UTC

May 19, 15:33 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our electrical infrastructure.

Start time : 29/07/2026 21:00 UTC
End time : 30/07/2026 07:00 UTC
Service impact : During the maintenance window, Some devices in the room S2-5X-02 will temporarily lose power redundancy. Single-powered devices connected may experience a brief power interruption while they are migrated to other power source.

Public network will be unavailable for approximately 30–45 minutes for the racks specified below :
S2-5X-02-05A
S2-5X-02-05B
S2-5X-02-08B
S2-5X-02-09B

IPMI (Intelligent Platform Management Interface) will be unavailable during the maintenance window for the racks specified bellow :
S2-5X-02-06B
S2-5X-02-07A
S2-5X-02-07B
S2-5X-02-08B
S2-5X-02-09B
S2-5X-02-10A

Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing an electrical maintenance.

Thank you for your understanding.
